name: Daily Standup
description: Time-boxed daily updates for engineering/product teams.

sections.title: Yesterday
sections.instruction: Everything completed or worked on yesterday — capture all items mentioned, do not condense.

sections.title: Today
sections.instruction: Everything planned for today — capture all items mentioned, do not condense.

sections.title: Blockers
sections.instruction: Any impediments, blockers, or concerns raised. Describe each one fully.

sections.title: Notes
sections.instruction: Any other topics, announcements, or discussions that came up. Capture everything mentioned.
